suspected_lcp_element: H1 text ('Dr. Sayuj Krishnan: Best Neurosurgeon...') or fallback Hero image (dr-sayuj-krishnan-portrait-sm.jpg)
bottleneck_identified: The Home page's `Hero` component uses a heavy Three.js canvas. During hydration and initial texture loading, a `z-50` full-screen black overlay (`bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm`) covers the entire viewport. This overlay obscures the primary H1 text (which is `z-40`), preventing the browser from registering the text as a meaningful Largest Contentful Paint until JS finishes loading images.
fix_applied: Modified `app/components/scrollytelling/Hero.tsx` to lower the loading indicator's z-index from `z-50` to `z-30`. This places it behind the Overlay Content (`z-40`), allowing the critical text to be painted and visible immediately without being obscured by a dark blurred overlay.
expected_improvement: Significantly improves LCP and perceived performance. Text content is no longer visually blocked during hydration, allowing browsers to record a much earlier LCP timestamp for the text elements.
how_to_verify: 1. Run `pnpm dev`. 2. Open `http://localhost:3000`. 3. Reload the page on slow 3G. 4. Verify that the H1 text is visible and readable immediately, not covered by the loading spinner's dark blurred backdrop.
